description_long: This object is a pair of pliers with a robust, industrial appearance, constructed from a metallic material with a mottled, galvanized finish. The body is solid and angular, with a wide, flat top surface and two parallel legs that form a stable base. The legs are straight and extend downward, creating a U-shaped profile when viewed from the side. The surface texture is slightly rough, with a matte, speckled gray coloration typical of galvanized steel. There are no visible ergonomic features, insulation, or additional grip patterns on the handles, and the jaws are not distinctly separated from the handles, giving the object a monolithic look. No branding, logos, or identifying marks are visible on any surface.
description: A solid, metallic pair of pliers with a galvanized, mottled gray finish and a simple, angular design. The object has a U-shaped profile and lacks visible ergonomic or grip features.
description_view_0: Front view shows the narrow U-shaped opening and the parallel legs extending downward.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the wide, flat top and the full rectangular profile of the object.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the U-shaped opening and straight legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, showing the flat, solid side surface.
attribute_handle_type: straight, uninsulated, rectangular metallic handles with no ergonomic features
attribute_jaw_design: flat, wide jaws integrated into the body, lacking serrations or special features
attribute_pivot_mechanism: fixed, non-adjustable joint with no visible pivot or slip-joint mechanism
attribute_grip_pattern: smooth, matte metallic surface with no visible grip pattern
